slots.notes: Full-screen hero background. High-contrast, modern, abstract or geometric pattern. Gradient overlay on top for text readability. No people, no screenshots. Native placeholder is a geometric abstract shapes or a dark forex background with overlay; replace with brand-specific visual asset. Fills the entire page - full-width, full-vheight.

mechanic: A full-page dark theme hero with background image, subtile image, logo, headline, body, subtext, and CTA button. A left-text, right-image layout with full-width background. Framer Motion useInView for entry.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3 as arbitrary values. Framer Motion v12 + for scroll-triggered animation. Icons from lucide-react.
reskinNotes: This is a blank slate for a crypto/lending/fintech brand. Every text blend is hardcoded as dummy copy - Brand, Hero (CTA, Title, Subtitle, Body) - there is no CS/backend. The fonts and color scheme are not tokens or variables - you are responsible for changing them. The assets (background image, subtile image, logo) are for you to replace with your brand's. The color scheme is in - you can change. Note: brand-name and nav-links are copySlots - they share data with the other hero pages. Your brand logo is in the top-left. Your hero image is on the right. Your CTA button reads Start Free Trial - it's a simple button with hover: background scale 0.98. Note: text-accent-color. Note: bolder plate.
